system.description:
CLASS DICE: D12

Guidance

You can add your D12 to your dice pool any time a god's power is influencing it, whether Scripture or Miracle. If it rolls a 1 on a Scripture, gain God Debt.

You don't believe in gods.

They exist, obviously. You owe the Fire God for that time he burned that fortress, and you've got that favour from the God of the Wild when you saved her rainforest. But believe? That's a strong word.

You don't believe in gods. You believe in tools. Useful tools.

Because if you think about it, the difference between "cleric" and "demonologist" is the same as the one between "freedom fighter" and "terrorist."

Play a Godbinder if you want to...

  • Unleash the power of a pantheon of your own design on the world.
  • Barter with your gods for anything you want... for a price.
  • Deal with the awful costs of the deals.

Because if you think about it, the difference between "cleric" and "demonologist" is the same as the one between "freedom fighter" and "terrorist."

PLAY A GODBINDER IF YOU WANT TO...

  • Unleash the power of a pantheon of your own design on the world.

  • Deal with the awful costs of the deals.

coreAbility.name: GUIDANCE
coreAbility.description: You can add your D12 to your dice pool any time a god's power is influencing it, whether Scripture or Miracle. If it rolls a 1 on a Scripture, gain God Debt.

looks.name: Heavy-metal holy crusader, looking for trouble
Beatific holy seer, looking for peace
Wild tattoos, frenzied eyes, looking for drugs
Urbane street magician, looking for the gold in someone's pocket

fields.label: Scripture
fields.initial:
"

All Godbinders gain access to three basic spells – Scripture shared between all gods:

<Noun> Blast

Attacks a target within medium range.

Heal

Heals 1 Health to a character within a short distance. Max 1 use per character per encounter.

Detect <Noun>

Determines if any of the <noun> is within a short distance.

<Noun> can be any noun related to the god; for example, "The God of The Wild" could fire thorn-blasts and detect wildlife.

To cast a Scripture, roll a Wis dice pool plus D12 with a Difficulty of 0 (see Guidance). If you succeed, the Scripture works as described in its entry.

"

fields.label: God Debt
fields.initial:
"

God Debt determines whether you owe a god, or a god owes you. For each god, you can accrue up to 5 God Debt. You may also be in credit to a god up to -5 God Debt.

God Debt can be called at any time it's positive, with the god requesting a task of you:

  • If accepted and completed: The God Debt is removed.
  • If accepted and failed: The God Debt stays the same.
  • If refused: Suffer 1 Wound for every point of God Debt the God chooses to remove.

You can remove God Debt by acting according to the god's desires.

"

fields.label: Miracles
fields.initial:
"

At any point, you can speak to a god and request a Miracle. If the god is willing, they'll give you a cost in exchange for the miracle. If you agree, the miracle happens. If not, it doesn't. If you break a promise made here, the spurned god immediately gets God Debt according to the scale of the Miracle.

Costs might include:

  • Taking on God Debt
  • Performing a specific task immediately
  • Owing them an open ended favour
  • Making a specific promise for the future
"

fields.label: Your Gods
fields.description: Choose one of the gods to start: this is the god you have a special relationship with. What's their name? You have the first level of a relationship with the god.
fields.hint: Track levels (1-3+), debt (-5 to +5), and trust (1 per level above 3) for each god.

fields.label: New Level in God
fields.description: Add a level in an existing or new god. Describe how you bettered or founded your relationship with this god.

fields.label: Mysterious Ways
fields: {"key":"godlyCommandment","type":"text","label":"Godly Commandment","initial":"","hint":"A specific repeatable task. Every time you fulfil it, reduce God Debt by one.","description":""}
{"key":"goodWorks","type":"boolean","label":"Good Works","initial":false,"hint":"Between adventures, automatically reduce God Debt by one. Describe the act of devotion.","description":""}

{"key":"uncoveringScripture","type":"text","label":"Uncovering Scripture","initial":"","hint":"A lost scripture (spell from Grimoire, Risk ≤ god level × 5). Was it lost, hidden or destroyed?","description":""}

fields.label: Higher Scripture
fields.description: You gain access to higher level scriptures for your gods. Each god has scriptures at levels 1, 2, and 3.

fields.label: Going Rogue
fields.description: When a god calls in debt and you don't pay, you may break contact rather than suffer punishment. Instead: Double your debt (calling it in will likely kill you), lose access to that god's scriptures, and the god sends 'bailiffs' - the GM can spend your debt to cause unfortunate events.

fields.label: Heretic
fields.description: Choose one of your gods. You understand a fundamental truth that all other believers deny.
fields: {"key":"hereticTruth","type":"html","label":"What is the truth?","initial":"","hint":"Gain 2 Trust in that god. Mainstream believers view you with suspicion or hatred.","description":""}

fields.label: God Banking
fields.description: Between sessions you can broker a deal between two of your gods, and move debt from one to the other. Describe how this deal works.

fields.label: Wicked or Divine
fields.description: You've gained a reputation - for better or worse. Choose one:
fields: {"key":"divineTeaching","type":"html","label":"Divine - Your Teaching","initial":"","hint":"Become a holy figure. What is your teaching? What do they call you?","description":""}
{"key":"wickedServant","type":"html","label":"Wicked - Debt-bonded Servant","initial":"","hint":"A god gives you a servant. Describe them.","description":""}

fields.label: A New Covenant
fields.description: You make a new god. It can be a creation based on your personality, an NPC who ascends, or something else.
fields: {"key":"newGodNature","type":"html","label":"New God's Nature","initial":"","hint":"Gain a level in the new god. May move existing levels to this god.","description":""}
{"key":"newGodScriptures","type":"html","label":"New God's Scriptures","initial":"","hint":"Collaborate with GM to design three scriptures.","description":""}

fields.label: Head of Religion
fields.description: You're the head (official or otherwise) of a god's worship. The religion is a faction in the Great Game.
fields: {"key":"religionDescription","type":"html","label":"Describe the religion/cult","initial":"","hint":"If you took A New Covenant, immediately forfeit all this power.","description":""}

fields.label: Your Heresy is Noted (Level 12)
fields.description: A god you have no levels in gets jealous. Your other gods glare. You may re-arrange all your god levels.
fields: {"key":"heresyRearrangement","type":"html","label":"How did you rearrange your levels?","initial":"","hint":"Track which gods are happy/unhappy based on level changes.","description":""}
